title: cytisus capitatus var. ciliatus
intro: Cytisus capitatus var. ciliatus, also known as the hairy broom, is a shrub-like plant species within the legume family that is native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. It has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues, including bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Cytisus capitatus var. ciliatus may be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
